issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across multiple workflows, including the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was identified as a bugged filter related to Loan Simple leads causing them to qualify for multiple workflow enrollments simultaneously. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close out the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage reverts and returns to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage (e.g., Committed or Referred Active), and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. The workflow was updated to include it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were moved back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer change was made on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the newly assigned one. The agent-facing automated email was still displaying the old LO's information. The issue was identified as a product-side problem and was resolved by Luis.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any agent-facing emails for deals where the LO was changed during the impact window to ensure the correct LO information is communicated.

issues.title: TC workflow not triggering for MRC deals moved to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: MRC deals that were updated to Offer Accepted were not enrolling into the TC workflow, resulting in TCs not receiving their closing tasks. The issue affected deals without a lender assigned, though the exact root cause was not confirmed publicly. HubSpot support was consulted and the issue was reported as fixed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
